# freeswitch_conference_room (Data Source)

Looks up an existing conference room by name.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "freeswitch_conference_room" "standup" {
  name = "standup"
}

output "standup_number" {
  value = data.freeswitch_conference_room.standup.number
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String)

### Read-Only

- `context` (String)
- `domain` (String)
- `enabled` (Boolean)
- `max_members` (Number)
- `number` (String)
- `profile` (String)
